title: openclaw/openclaw
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、开源的 AI 个人助手，支持在任何操作系统和平台上运行。它强调用户数据自主权（own-your-data），采用“龙虾方式”设计，旨在提供隐私保护且高度可定制的智能助手体验。该项目在 GitHub 上拥有超过 38 万星标，社区关注度极高。
summary_en: OpenClaw is a cross-platform, open-source AI personal assistant that runs on any OS and platform. It emphasizes data ownership (own-your-data) and is designed in 'the lobster way', aiming to provide a privacy-preserving and highly customizable intelligent assistant experience. The project has over 383,000 stars on GitHub, indicating significant community interest.
